untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern requires visual/shape-based recognition (diamond geometry detection, support/resistance identification at pattern vertices, and breakout confirmation above upper resistance). These geometric pattern characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed price, moving average, momentum, and volume indicators without access to pattern recognition or candlestick formation analysis tools.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence of the pattern using available indicators: downtrend (price below SMA), upward volume trend (volume > 20-period average), and breakout exit (price above SMA). However, the core 'diamond shape' requirement is untranslatable without pattern recognition capabilities. The 95% success rate and 36% average rise are documented but not incorporated as they are pattern-outcome metrics, not entry/exit rules. Breakout direction is UP as specified in parameters.
